chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-924 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 4928/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 4929/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 10.09.2025 Mr. Pardeep Kumar B. Butani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he will be satisfied and would not press this petition on the pretext that the petitioner would file proper application/appeal before the Department/competent authority, seeking the remedy he intends to avail through this Court by way of instant petition. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, present in the Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice of instant petition and does not oppose the proposal so advanced by counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application/appeal before the Department/competent authority for redressal of his grievance within a period of thirty days from today. Judge Judge Manzoor
